symptom: Model accuracy drops suddenly after retraining with new dataset
root_cause: Corrupted or partially loaded training data due to failed ingestion job
resolution: Validate dataset integrity using checksums and ensure full data ingestion before training

symptom: Model outputs NaN or missing predictions for certain inputs
root_cause: Null or missing values in critical input features not handled during preprocessing
resolution: Add imputation strategies (mean/median/default) and validate input data before inference

symptom: Model predictions consistently biased toward certain user groups
root_cause: Training dataset is imbalanced or under-represents certain groups
resolution: Rebalance dataset using sampling techniques and evaluate fairness metrics

symptom: Model fails or produces incorrect outputs when new categorical values appear in production
root_cause: Unseen categories not handled by encoding scheme
resolution: Use robust encoders (e.g. target encoding or unknown category handling) and retrain model

symptom: Feature distributions in production differ significantly from training data
root_cause: Data drift due to changing user behavior or upstream data sources
resolution: Monitor feature distributions and trigger retraining when drift exceeds threshold

symptom: Training metrics are inflated but real-world performance is poor
root_cause: Duplicate records in dataset leading to overfitting
resolution: Remove duplicates and enforce uniqueness constraints during data ingestion

symptom: Model predictions appear random despite stable training process
root_cause: Incorrect or noisy labels in training dataset
resolution: Perform label audits and use automated label validation techniques

symptom: Model performs well on training data but poorly on validation/test data
root_cause: Overfitting due to noisy or low-quality data
resolution: Clean dataset and apply regularization techniques such as dropout or early stopping

symptom: Model predictions shift unexpectedly after deployment
root_cause: Inconsistent feature scaling between training and production pipelines
resolution: Persist and reuse scaling parameters from training during inference

symptom: Model predicts majority class for most inputs
root_cause: Highly imbalanced target variable distribution
resolution: Use resampling techniques or weighted loss functions to address imbalance

symptom: Training becomes unstable with large fluctuations in loss
root_cause: Presence of extreme outliers in dataset
resolution: Detect and remove or cap outliers using statistical methods

symptom: Data loading pipeline is slow and becomes a bottleneck
root_cause: Inefficient storage format such as CSV for large datasets
resolution: Use optimized formats like Parquet or Arrow and enable parallel reads

symptom: Validation accuracy is unrealistically high compared to test performance
root_cause: Feature leakage due to inclusion of future or target-related information
resolution: Ensure strict separation between training and evaluation data and remove leaking features

symptom: Dataset size increases unexpectedly after joining multiple tables
root_cause: Incorrect join logic causing duplication due to non-unique keys
resolution: Validate join keys and enforce uniqueness constraints before joining

symptom: Time-based features behave inconsistently across records
root_cause: Missing or inconsistent timestamps in raw data
resolution: Ensure proper timestamp logging and handle missing values explicitly

symptom: Predictions vary significantly for similar inputs
root_cause: High noise in input features
resolution: Apply smoothing, filtering, or feature engineering to reduce noise

symptom: Categorical features produce unexpected results after encoding
root_cause: Incorrect encoding method (e.g. ordinal encoding for nominal data)
resolution: Use appropriate encoding such as one-hot or target encoding based on feature type

symptom: Data pipeline crashes during processing
root_cause: Schema mismatch between expected and actual data
resolution: Add schema validation checks before processing pipeline

symptom: Model fails in production due to missing input features
root_cause: Upstream data source changed schema without notification
resolution: Implement schema versioning and validation checks

symptom: Model outputs inconsistent values across runs
root_cause: Normalization statistics computed differently between training and inference
resolution: Store and reuse normalization statistics from training phase

symptom: Data pipeline latency increases as dataset grows
root_cause: Processing entire dataset instead of batching
resolution: Implement batch processing and streaming pipelines

symptom: Data from different sources cannot be merged correctly
root_cause: Inconsistent data formats and schemas across sources
resolution: Standardize schema and enforce data contracts across sources

symptom: Duplicate records appear in production data over time
root_cause: Improper ingestion logic or lack of deduplication checks
resolution: Add unique constraints and deduplication logic in ingestion pipeline

symptom: Time-based features show inconsistent patterns
root_cause: Timezone mismatch between data sources
resolution: Normalize all timestamps to a common timezone (e.g. UTC)

symptom: Data volume reduces unexpectedly after transformation
root_cause: Faulty filtering or transformation logic dropping valid records
resolution: Add validation checks to monitor row counts before and after transformations

symptom: Features show unusually high correlation with target variable
root_cause: Data leakage due to inclusion of proxy or future features
resolution: Identify and remove leaking features using correlation and domain knowledge

symptom: Model performance is poor due to lack of signal in data
root_cause: Dataset is too small or lacks informative features
resolution: Collect more data or engineer more meaningful features

symptom: Aggregated features produce incorrect values
root_cause: Incorrect grouping or aggregation logic
resolution: Validate aggregation queries and grouping keys

symptom: Data in production lags behind real-time events
root_cause: Slow or inefficient ETL pipeline
resolution: Optimize ETL jobs and consider streaming architecture

symptom: Same label has different meanings across datasets
root_cause: Inconsistent labeling standards across data sources
resolution: Define and enforce unified labeling guidelines across pipelines
